goal: Deterministic parser for NRHP Montpelier Historic District 2017 amendment PDF -> per-resource structured records, validated against hand-verified ground truth

children.description: Single regex: line-start number + address containing street-type word. No sequence logic.

failure_modes: variable whitespace after the number (up to 8 spaces)
'(formerly ...)' between house number and street name breaks the address pattern
headers without street-typed addresses (named buildings, structures)
no defense against numbered list items inside descriptions

children.description: Strip per-page NPS boilerplate, normalize unicode, accept candidate N only if it advances the running inventory number (N==expected or small logged jump), require header evidence (street word | year | status | demolished).

attempts.action: boilerplate strip + unicode map + state machine (max jump +3) + evidence gate
failure_modes: #517-530 use '517 (formerly 1).' renumber syntax -> never candidates -> machine stalls at 517 and rejects 531-563 (cascade)
#297 exists only as '297a.'/'297b.' (lettered split) -> logged as jump

children.description: Extend candidate grammar: optional letter suffix (secondary buildings: garages/barns/carriage houses) + optional '(formerly N)' renumber clause. State machine accepts same-number suffix succession (297a->297b).

attempts.entries_found: 670 records / 563 distinct numbers, 0 missing, 0 dupes, 0 rejects
attempts.notes: 108 lettered records = secondary buildings; reconciles with the document's stated 653 total (563 primary + ~90 counted secondary). Spot check exposed field bugs: status classifier ('on' in 'Con'[:3] -> everything non-contributing), #487 '(demolished) replaced with' parsed as 1960/1-story predecessor, duplicated name segments.

children.description: status startswith('non'); '(demolished) replaced with' records describe the REPLACEMENT (year/stories from post-'replaced with' text, last stories mention in body); dedupe name segments.

attempts.action: status fix + replaced-with header split + last-stories-match for replaced records + name dedupe
attempts.validation: ALL PASS: structural 563/563, spot-check 13 entries/all fields, coverage (status .97 year .99 stories .93 constr .83), plausibility 0 violations, target recovery 5/5, doc totals within tolerance (566/571 C, 86/82 NC)
